label: Product Profile
definition: A detailed evaluation of a specific vendor's product, including features, competitive positioning, and buying recommendations

label: Relational Database Management
definition: Market domain covering relational database management systems (RDBMS) and related data management technologies

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Qualitative and quantitative assessment of industry trends, competitive dynamics, and market conditions using publicly available information

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Structured analysis of specific vendor strategies, product positioning, and competitive strengths and weaknesses

label: Benchmarking
definition: Systematic measurement and comparison of performance using standardized test specifications with full-disclosure reporting

label: Product Description
definition: Factual description of a product's features or capabilities

label: Market Assessment
definition: Analyst evaluation of a product's or company's competitive standing in the market

label: Competitive Assessment
definition: Aberdeen's assessment of a named competitor or competitive product

label: Buying Recommendation
definition: Advice to IS buyers on when or why to consider a product

label: Editorial Opinion
definition: Analyst opinion or interpretive statement not directly sourced from vendor

label: Benchmark
definition: Performance benchmark result from standard industry test (e.g., TPC)

label: Product Roadmap
definition: Description of announced or upcoming product features

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data point about market size, pricing, cost structures, or commercial dynamics derived from research

label: Revenue Data
definition: Company financial revenue figure

label: Profit Data
definition: Company financial profit figure

label: Risk Assessment
definition: Analyst evaluation of risks or challenges facing a company or product

label: Feature Description
definition: Description of a specific technical feature or capability

label: Standards Compliance
definition: Description of compliance with industry or de facto standards

label: Platform Support
definition: Description of supported operating systems, hardware platforms, or environments

label: Protocol Support
definition: Description of supported networking or communication protocols

label: Gateway/Interoperability
definition: Description of connectivity to external or competing systems

label: Vendor Statement
definition: Direct quote or paraphrase of a vendor's stated strategy or goal

label: Market Expansion
definition: Description of a vendor's strategy to expand into new market segments

label: Market Trend
definition: Directional market movement or adoption pattern.

label: Heritage/Maturity
definition: Reference to a product's historical pedigree or years of experience

label: Sales Channel
definition: Description of how a product is sold or distributed

label: Ecosystem/Partnership
definition: Description of partner products or ecosystem integrations

label: DORS Evaluation Criteria
definition: Aberdeen's criteria framework for evaluating distributed open RDBMS products

label: Benchmark Price-Performance
definition: Price-performance metric from a standardized benchmark

label: TP Monitor Support
definition: Description of supported transaction processing monitors

label: High Availability
definition: Description of fault tolerance and failover capabilities

label: Positive
definition: Observation conveys a favorable or strong result

label: Negative
definition: Observation conveys an unfavorable or weak result

label: Neutral
definition: Observation is factual with no evaluative tone

label: High Confidence
definition: Assessment or data point is well-supported by multiple sources, specific numbers, or direct document citations

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Finding supported by qualitative analysis, expert interpretation, or retrospective assessment with reasonable evidence

label: Low Confidence
definition: Finding is inferred from limited evidence in the source text or involves significant extrapolation

label: Company
definition: A commercial organization

label: Subject
definition: Entity discussed in the study without specific leadership designation

label: Competitor
definition: A competing company mentioned in a competitive context

label: Author
definition: Organization that wrote and published the study

label: Active
definition: Technology is currently actively maintained, developed, and commercially available

label: Acquired
definition: Entity acquired by another company; brand may no longer exist independently

label: Rebranded
definition: Company changed its name or was absorbed under a different brand

label: Unknown
definition: Current status of entity is not determined.

label: Legacy
definition: Product no longer actively marketed but may still receive limited support

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer in active use or commercial support; superseded by successor technologies

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of organizational approach within the Aberdeen Competitive Framework tiers (Laggard, Industry Norm, Best in Class)

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Observation is a forward-looking prediction about future market conditions, technology adoption, or business outcomes made at time of study

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Retrospective record of what actually happened to a company, product, or technology after the study date; used to assess prescience

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Empirical evaluation of a specific technology product or system based on hands-on testing, performance measurement, or documented behavior

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative or time-based measurement from testing; a specific metric value obtained through direct measurement or structured evaluation

label: Framework Factor
definition: A component or variable within an analytical framework or model used to structure the analysis; a dimension of a multi-factor evaluation scheme

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Observation records an analyst judgment, interpretation, or recommendation that goes beyond raw data to offer evaluative conclusions

label: Document Review
definition: Assessment based on review of published documentation such as vendor support policies and threat databases

label: Field Research
definition: Primary research conducted through direct interaction with products, services, or market participants in real-world settings

label: Revenue Benchmarking
definition: Measurement and comparison of entity revenues against market total and peers; core methodology of Aberdeen's annual RISC/Unix survey

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources; applied to actual-outcome observations
